Package com.pallycon.widevinelibrary

Class MpdTrackSelector

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.MpdTrackSelector
  • public class MpdTrackSelector
extends java.lang.Object
    parses MPEG-DASH manifest file (MPD file) and modifies it. When the user download Adaptive contents, it may consume large space of storage because the Adaptive contents has multiple media for same contents. This class supports to select media to download by user's selection.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      MpdTrackSelector​(android.content.Context context)
      constructor of MpdTrackSelector

      returns the number of Representation in audio AdaptiveSet.

      returns the number of Period of parsed MPEG-DASH manifest.

      returns the number of video AdaptiveSet in Period.

      returns the number of Representation in video AdaptiveSet.

      returns the list of bandwidth in video AdaptiveSet.

      returns the array of bandwidth in video AdaptiveSet.

      returns the list of codec in video AdaptiveSet.
      java.lang.String[] getVideoCodecs​(int periodId, int adaptiveSetId)
      returns the array of codec in video AdaptiveSet.

      returns the list of video height in video AdaptiveSet.
      java.lang.String[] getVideoHeights​(int periodId, int adaptiveSetId)
      returns the array of video height in video AdaptiveSet.

      returns the list of mime type in video AdaptiveSet.
      java.lang.String[] getVideoMimeTypes​(int periodId, int adaptiveSetId)
      returns the array of mime type in video AdaptiveSet.
      void logInfo()
      print parsed video and audio information at Logcat.
      boolean parseMpd​(android.net.Uri contentUri)
      parses MPEG-DASH manifest file, *.mpd.
      void selectAll​(boolean select)
      selects or unselects all video and audio track to download.
      void selectAudioRepresentation​(int periodId, int adaptiveSetId, int representationId, boolean select)
      selects or unselects audio Representation to download.
      void selectBestQuality()
      selects best quality of video and audio Representation in each AdaptiveSet to download and unselect the others.
      void selectVideoRepresentation​(int periodId, int adaptiveSetId, int representationId, boolean select)
      selects or unselects video Representation to download.
      void setCookie​(java.lang.String cookie)
      set cookie.
      java.lang.String writeModifiedMpd()
      write selected Representation information to new MPD file and returns the new MPD filename.

        Returns:
        true if successful or false

        public void logInfo()

      • selectAll

        public void selectAll​(boolean select)
        selects or unselects all video and audio track to download.
        Parameters:
        select - flag for select or unselect

      • selectVideoRepresentation

        public void selectVideoRepresentation​(int periodId,
                                      int adaptiveSetId,
                                      int representationId,
                                      boolean select)
        selects or unselects video Representation to download.
        Parameters:
        periodId - Period index
        adaptiveSetId - AdaptiveSet index
        representationId - Representation index
        select - flag for select or unselect

      • selectAudioRepresentation

        public void selectAudioRepresentation​(int periodId,
                                      int adaptiveSetId,
                                      int representationId,
                                      boolean select)
        selects or unselects audio Representation to download.
        Parameters:
        periodId - Period index
        adaptiveSetId - AdaptiveSet index
        representationId - Representation index
        select - flag for select or unselect

      • selectBestQuality

        public void selectBestQuality()
        selects best quality of video and audio Representation in each AdaptiveSet to download and unselect the others.

      • writeModifiedMpd

        public java.lang.String writeModifiedMpd()
        write selected Representation information to new MPD file and returns the new MPD filename. The new MPD filename must be input DownloadTack class, setModifiedMpdPath().
        Returns:
        the modified MPD filename
